text:
User: make directory src
Action: {"mode":"shell","command":"mkdir -p src"}

User: create a file named notes.txt
Action: {"mode":"write_file","path":"notes.txt","content":""}

User: make hello.py that prints hi
Action: {"mode":"write_file","path":"hello.py","content":"print('hi')"}

User: compile main.c
Action: {"mode":"shell","command":"gcc -o main main.c"}
